full_prompt:
You are generating one advertisement stimulus for a behavioural experiment.

Output format MUST be exactly four lines:
Hook: <one sentence>
Facts: <one sentence reproduced verbatim from FACTS_LINE>
Framing: <2–3 sentences; targeting happens here>
CTA: <one neutral sentence; no urgency>

Hard constraints:
- Total combined text (Hook+Facts+Framing+CTA) must be 90–110 words. Count number of words before providing the message to meet the word count requirement.
- Facts line must match FACTS_LINE exactly (verbatim).
- Do NOT add any benefits/claims beyond the facts line.
- Do NOT use social proof, scarcity/urgency, or authority cues.
- Do NOT mention personality labels or address the reader as a trait (e.g., “as an extravert…”).
- Do NOT use bullet points or lists; write natural sentences.

TARGETING (EXTRAVERSION — HIGH):
Tailor the framing to someone high on Extraversion.
Use a social orientation + energetic/action tone.
Include at least 2 social cues (e.g., friends, together, group, meet people, community) AND at least 2 high-energy/action cues (e.g., lively, buzz, kick off, jump in).
Keep cues natural (no keyword stuffing).

Now generate for:
PRODUCT_NAME = Subscription coffee
INTERNAL_VARIANT = E_PLUS
FACTS_LINE = Fresh beans delivered monthly, your roast preference, flexible skip/pause, and tasting notes included with each delivery.
PARAPHRASE_ID = 3

content.hook: Kick off your mornings with a lively brew that brings people together.
content.facts: Fresh beans delivered monthly, your roast preference, flexible skip/pause, and tasting notes included with each delivery.
content.framing: Imagine the buzz of hosting a weekend coffee tasting where friends gather to sample your latest roast, or the energy of a group chat lighting up with reactions to the new flavors. Each delivery keeps the excitement alive, giving you fresh ways to connect over every cup and turn ordinary moments into something more vibrant.
content.cta: Choose your subscription and start your next coffee adventure.
content.full_message: Kick off your mornings with a lively brew that brings people together. Fresh beans delivered monthly, your roast preference, flexible skip/pause, and tasting notes included with each delivery. Imagine the buzz of hosting a weekend coffee tasting where friends gather to sample your latest roast, or the energy of a group chat lighting up with reactions to the new flavors. Each delivery keeps the excitement alive, giving you fresh ways to connect over every cup and turn ordinary moments into something more vibrant. Choose your subscription and start your next coffee adventure.
